texto: Those who scorn you taunt only themselves -- I knew this without reading one word
autor: because in reading one is reminded of the truth man is given at birth -- by man I mean man and woman.
explicacao: Citação de because in reading one is reminded of the truth man is given at birth -- by man I mean man and woman. sobre temas ligados a familia. “Those who scorn you taunt only themselves -- I knew this without reading one word” articula familia, david-adams-richards, mercy-among-the-children em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como mercy-among-the-children.
